name: Orange Flavoured Risotto
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Firm tofu, cut into strips
1 small Can water chestnuts, drained & thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute the onion in the oil over moderate heat for 2 to 3 minutes, stirring occasionally.
2. Stir in the rice and cook for 1 minute.
3. Pour in the stock, cover, and bring to a boil.
4. Reduce heat and simmer for 40 minutes.
5. While the rice is cooking, mix together the tofu strips, water chestnuts, raisins, tamari, orange rind, and juice. Add the cinnamon and parsley. Set aside.
6. When the rice has cooked, stir in the tofu mixture and gently heat through.
7. Season with salt and pepper.
8. Serve hot garnished with the nuts.
